creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to bcomputerguy from comment #13)

Maintainer emails as set in the port (MAINTAINER) must match their Bugzilla account email so that maintainership can be verified when maintainers submit updates via Bugzilla. Please update one or the other so they match.

All attachments were obsoleted. I assume this is because an updated patch will be provided (post QA) ?
